{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# Mathematical Background {#sec-math-background}

<!-- Just-enough refreshers, pitched at the reader who has seen this before.
     Terse; point outward for depth. -->

## Linear algebra {.unnumbered}

<!-- Vectors, matrices, matmul as the core primitive; inner products, norms,
     projections. -->

## Probability {.unnumbered}

<!-- Distributions, expectation, entropy, cross-entropy and KL; maximum
     likelihood. -->

## Calculus and autodiff {.unnumbered}

<!-- Gradients, the chain rule, reverse-mode autodiff in one page. -->

## Numerical computing {.unnumbered}

<!-- Floating point, log-sum-exp / numerical stability of softmax. -->
